test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_u64_{card} (k UInt64, o UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_u64_{card} SELECT number % {card}, number % 4 FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_lc_{card} (lc LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY lc
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_lc_{card} SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % {card})) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_lc_long (lc LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY lc
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_lc_long SELECT toLowCardinality(leftPad(toString(number % 200000), 48, '0')) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.query: SELECT DISTINCT k FROM test_u64_{card} FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT k, o FROM test_u64_{card} FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT lc FROM test_lc_{card} FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT lc FROM test_lc_long FORMAT Null
